title: Get All News - Technology Articles in English
description: Example request and response for fetching technology articles in English using the /news/all endpoint.

data.title: New AI Chip Promises 10x Performance Gains for Edge Devices
data.description: A leading semiconductor company has unveiled a next-generation AI processor designed specifically for edge computing applications.
data.keywords: AI, chip, semiconductor, edge computing, performance
data.snippet: The company announced the new processor at its annual developer conference, claiming significant improvements over previous generations...

data.title: Open Source Framework Simplifies Multi-Agent AI Systems
data.description: A new open source project aims to make building multi-agent AI applications more accessible to developers.
data.keywords: open source, AI, multi-agent, framework, developers
data.snippet: The framework, released under MIT license, provides abstractions for orchestrating multiple AI agents in production environments...

data.title: Cloud Provider Expands European Data Centers for GDPR Compliance
data.description: A major cloud computing company is opening three new data centers in Europe to help customers meet data residency requirements.
data.keywords: cloud, data center, Europe, GDPR, compliance
data.snippet: The expansion will provide customers with additional options for storing and processing data within European Union borders...
